arts.ttl: Eddie Howe drops Newcastle United team news hint as star set for under-21 appearance
arts.sum: As it stands, Newcastle United youngster Lewis Miley will feature for the club's under-21 side in Friday evening's clash with Crystal Palace - and therefore not travel to Selhurst Park with the senior side for Saturday's Premier League showdown. A double injury blow in Monday's defeat to West Ham United opened the door for the 18-year-old to be recalled to Eddie Howe's squad for this weekend's trip to the capital.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United keeping an eye on Middlesbrough standout ahead of January

arts.ttl: Bruno Guimaraes injury update delivered by Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe
arts.sum: The Brazil international will be assessed at Benton today after coming off early with a glute injury in the 2-0 defeat against West Ham on Monday night at St James' Park. When asked if the demands of being skipper of Newcastle and flying around the world playing for Brazil are proving to be a mental strain for the player, Howe said: "Mentally I think Bruno has been really strong.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United owners reality after bill amendment could see them 'kicked out'
arts.sum: An amendment to the new Football Governance Bill, which seeks to establish an independent football regulator, has been proposed that could ban state-owned clubs from English football. The likelihood of a proposal to ban state ownership in English football making it into the final bill is deemed'small', according to The Times.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer names the Newcastle United star he expects to leave in January
arts.sum: Alan Shearer expects Newcastle United to be fully open to a sale for Miguel Almiron in the January window. All you have to do is follow our channel on WhatsApp by clicking this link or you can find us by searching Chronicle Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Proposed Football Governance Bill changes could see Newcastle owners being booted out
arts.sum: Newcastle owners, PIF, and Man City owner, Sheikh Mansour, could be booted out of the Premier League after new changes were proposed to the Football Governance Bill. The contentious issue that remains for many is state ownership of clubs, and under rules being proposed by Labour peer Lord Bassam of Brighton, this would cease. arts.ttl: West Ham, Crystal Palace and Brighton ‘could quickly go on offensive’ for Lille player – Transfer on the way
arts.sum: Lille’s Ngal’ayel Mukau has ended up on the radar of West Ham United, Crystal Palace and Brighton & Hove Albion. The 20-year-old joined the Ligue 1 side from Belgian side KV Mechelen in the summer and signed a deal until 2028. arts.ttl: Chelsea confident of landing £80m Newcastle target who is extremely tempted by West London adventure
arts.sum: Former Chelsea youth ace, Marc Guehi, who was the subject of recent Newcastle interest, would apparently be extremely tempted by a move to back the Blues. Guehi has cemented his place in the England squad and arguably is one of the most sought after commodities in the transfer market. arts.ttl: Alan Shearer's Newcastle United transfer fear that would need 'world class' response
arts.sum: Newcastle United legend Alan Shearer has warned his old club not to even contemplating parting with Alexander Isak - unless they have a "world class" replacement lined up. ""Unless they have a like-for-like, world class replacement ready to come in then it would be crazy to sell him in January and I don't think they will.
